title: AltmanAI 2026 Research & Development Program Established
summary: Established the 2026 AltmanAI research and development program as a Pittsburgh-rooted, human-first AI portfolio spanning DailyPilot product intelligence, the P.A.I.H.I. standard, the human-first reference architecture, the AltmanAI SDK, ReleaseShield, public evidence infrastructure, and credibility hardening. The program defines accurate maturity labels, human authorization boundaries, evidence requirements, security and privacy expectations, AI-assistance disclosure, and measurable execution priorities.
sha256_method: SHA-256 of canonical UTF-8 JSON with sorted keys and compact separators, excluding sha256, sha256_method, and custody_line.
custody_line: Digital GitHub record prepared on an authorized branch. Final custody is established by the resulting pull request and merge commit after explicit Founder approval.

poc_tags.role: Founder & CEO — R&D direction, human authorization, final review
AI development and execution partner — live portfolio audit, research architecture, documentation, registry preparation, and GitHub implementation
